view.title: Validate persona scenario #2
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 2 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the effectiveness of rate limiting in the context of a DDoS attack simulation. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the system's behavior under such conditions or how rate limiting is enforced. The expected result requires a clear outcome from the simulation, but the evidence does not confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it leads to a failure report, resulting in an inconclusive status.
